title: What a Way to Go!
writer: Gwen Davis, Betty Comden, Adolph Green
actors: Shirley MacLaine, Paul Newman, Robert Mitchum
plot: Four-time widow Louisa May Foster sees a psychologist to discuss her marriages, in which her husbands (humble businessman Edgar, blase millionaire Rod, bohemian painter Larry, and nightclub singer Pinky) got rich and died because ...
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 1 win & 7 nominations total
